title_home: افتتاح عصر جديد من العملة الرقمية بدون مفاتيح خاصة للبشرية جمعاء!
home_mianheading: لقد كانت دلتا رائدة في حقبة جديدة من النقود الرقمية اللامركزية للبشرية جمعاء، والتي لا تتطلب الوصاية على المفتاح الخاص!
download_heading: قم بتحميل تطبيق Delta وابدأ في التنقيب عن الأصول وإدارتها...، انضم الآن!
is_no_referrer_DID_yet: إذا لم يكن هناك مُحيل DID حتى الآن
download_desc2: إذا كان لديك بالفعل معرف محيل DID، يمكنك النقر على الأيقونة أدناه لتنزيل تطبيق Delta.
decentralization_desc: آمن، ومفتوح المصدر، وشفاف، وغير قابل للتزوير، ويشارك الجميع في عملية الصب والاعتماد
mobile_first_desc: سهولة الاستخدام والتنقيب عن الألغام واستخدام ميزات مختلفة على هاتفك المحمول
safety_circle_desc: التحقق من الأمن الاجتماعي المزدوج، لا يعتمد إثبات الهوية على أي منظمة مركزية
fair_distribution_desc: طريقة الإصدار هي من خلال التعدين المجتمعي ومكافآت البناء البيئي، دون أي بيع مسبق أو ICO
web3_application_center_desc: يمكنك إنشاء تطبيقات Web3 ونشرها بسهولة من خلال ساحة تطبيقات dApp Plaza
ICP_smart_blockchain: سلسلة الكتل الذكية لبرنامج المقارنات الدولية
home_subheading: You can start using the Delta mobile app now to mine delta digital money for free and energy-savingly, and easily manage cross-chain assets…
download_desc1: No need to invest 1 cent of legal currency! Delta is your money, you are entitled to mine for free, all you need is a trusted <u>referrer DID</u>.
search_find_delta_referrer: you can find Delta referrer DID through Internet search
3No-Verification_desc: Delta is a digital money network that follows the 3-No-verification framework, which can effectively prevent the forgetting of credentials and the loss or theft of assets.
environment_friendly_desc: No additional consumption of electricity and network, no large amount of electrical waste
decentralized_multi-chain_wallet_desc: Easily manage cross-chain assets without any private keys or mnemonic phrases
ICP_smart_blockchain_desc: Based on ICP smart contract operating platform, safe, reliable, efficient computing, unlimited expansion
DAO_governance_model_desc: Decentralized collaborative governance for all mankind, balanced development, long-term reliability
explore_delta_heading:
Explore the mystery of Delta,
Let’s build a complete ecological chain of future social digital currency together...
DSMS_access_terminal_heading: The DSMS verification access terminal is Delta's decentralized verification SMS access terminal and is the front-end part of the three-no verification (no private key, no mnemonic phrase, no password required) solution
access_terminal_question1: What are the benefits of becoming a validator?
access_terminal_question3: Do I need to download the terminal program?
access_terminal_question4: What does a validator need to prepare?
access_terminal_answer1: While validators share verification resources for Delta network security, they can also obtain corresponding verification rewards. For details on the validator reward rules, please refer to the relevant chapters of the white paper.
access_terminal_answer2: Everyone has a fair chance to become a verifier. If you want to become a verifier member, you can enter the "Menu" page of Delta App and find the "DSMS Verification Qualification" entry. After checking and meeting the relevant conditions, you can run to become a verifier.
access_terminal_answer3: Delta users who have not obtained verifier qualifications do not need to download the verification terminal.
access_terminal_answer4: If you have obtained the authenticator qualification, you need to prepare an idle smartphone and a dedicated MSISDN, and have good signal conditions to install the verification terminal and perform verification access tasks in real time.
about_3-No-Verification_to_whitepaper_ch: For more details about 3-No-Verification, please refer to the relevant chapters of the White Paper.
canister_status_desc: تعتمد Delta بنسبة 100% على blockchain ICP ويتم تأمينها بواسطة تقنية توقيع عتبة ECDSA.
no_canister_info: لا توجد معلومات متاحة عن العلبة.
no_transactions_found: لم يتم العثور على أي معاملات
no_results_found: لم يتم العثور على نتائج ل
